lines: The tallest buildings on Earth. How high do they go?
Leaning Tower of Pisa. The famous lean. Just 56 meters.
Statue of Liberty. Standing at 93 meters including the pedestal.
Big Ben. The iconic London clock tower. 96 meters.
Eiffel Tower. Once the tallest structure in the world. 330 meters.
Empire State Building. A New York legend. 443 meters tall.
Shanghai Tower. China's tallest. 632 meters of glass and steel.
Burj Khalifa. The king. 828 meters. Nearly a full kilometer into the sky.

seo.title: Tallest Buildings Comparison — How High Can We Build? 🏗️
